metadata.file_path: /Volumes/My Passport/Ojo otra vez musica de Tidal Original descarga/Consolidado2025/Tracks/Duran Duran - Rio (Night Version) [2009 Remaster].flac
metadata.title: Rio (Night Version) [2009 Remaster]
metadata.lyrics:
[01:29.64] Moving on the floor now, babe, you're a bird of paradise
[01:36.38] Cherry ice cream smile, I suppose it's very nice
[01:42.44] With a step to your left and a flick to the right, you catch that mirror way out west
[01:50.11] You know you're something special, and you look like you're the best
[02:00.67] Her name is Rio and she dances on the sand
[02:07.22] Just like that river twisting through a dusty land
[02:14.12] And when she shines, she really shows you all she can
[02:20.94] Oh, Rio, Rio, dance across the Rio Grande
[02:26.61] 
[02:41.46] I've seen you on the beach, I've seen you on TV
[02:48.47] Two of a billion stars, it means so much to me
[02:56.79] Like a birthday or a pretty view
[03:01.98] But then I'm sure that you know it's just for you
[03:12.22] Her name is Rio and she dances on the sand
[03:18.92] Just like that river twisting through a dusty land
[03:25.88] And when she shines, she really shows you all she can
[03:32.68] Oh, Rio, Rio, dance across the Rio Grande
[03:38.45] 
[04:47.50] Hey now, whoa, look at that, did she nearly run you down?
[04:53.80] At the end of the drive, the lawmen arrive
[04:57.66] You make me feel alive, alive, alive
[05:03.13] I'll take my chance, 'cause luck is on my side or something
[05:09.46] I know what you're thinking, I'll tell you something, I know what you're thinking
[05:18.52] Her name is Rio and she dances on the sand
[05:25.36] Just like that river twists across a dusty land
[05:32.25] And when she shines, she really shows you all she can
[05:38.98] Oh, Rio, Rio, dance across the Rio Grande
[05:45.87] Her name is Rio, she don't need to understand
[05:52.76] And I might find her if I'm looking like I can
[05:59.47] Oh, Rio, Rio, hear them shout across the land
[06:06.36] From mountains in the north down to the Rio Grande
[06:12.05] 
[06:27.22] (Too-too, too-doo, too-doo)
[06:30.21] (Too-too, too-doo, too-doo)
[06:33.75] (Too-too, too-doo, too-doo, too-too)
[06:36.14] (Too-doo, too-doo)
[06:39.49]
